items.title: Proaction raises $4.2M seed to build an AI-native alternative to legacy fleet management services
items.note: Des Moines startup backed by GTMfund and Holman Growth Ventures targets maintenance, rentals, registrations and claims workflows

items.title: Moonshot AI releases Kimi K3, the largest open-source model ever, rivaling Anthropic and OpenAI
items.note: 2.8-trillion-parameter model with 1M-token context scores third on GDPval-AA v2, behind only Claude and GPT-5.6's flagship models

items.title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
items.note: $1.5B valuation just over a year after launch, a five-fold jump in six months

items.title: NAR: pending home sales fall 5.4% in June as mortgage rates hit a near-year high
items.note: Declines across all four US regions; record home prices squeeze first-time buyers, says NAR's chief economist

items.title: Freddie Mac: 30-year mortgage rate climbs to 6.55%, its highest reading in weeks
items.note: Up from 6.49% the week prior, reversing the brief dip toward affordability

items.title: Once a $1B+ unicorn, Israeli edge-AI chipmaker Hailo is selling its business for just tens of millions
items.note: A Nasdaq-listed US chipmaker is in advanced talks to buy the activity after edge-AI demand grew far slower than investors bet

items.title: Beacon Security raises $13M seed to build the data layer powering AI cybersecurity agents
items.note: ARR up 300%+ in H1 2026; Notable Capital leads with over 60 founders and CISOs also writing checks

items.title: Air-defense veterans raise $36M seed for Skapion's counter-drone-swarm defense system
items.note: UP.Partners and Khosla Ventures co-lead a mobile system meant to work in contested, comms-denied environments
